messages.buy_fails_object_does_not_exist: Go somewhere else ya bum, I aint got tat.
messages.buy_fails_player_cannot_afford_object: What'a ya thinking, I can gives the stuff away???
messages.buy_succeeds: Tanks, anything else I can getcha?
messages.sell_fails_object_does_not_exist: Get a brain, you don't got tat.
messages.sell_fails_shop_does_not_buy_object: Whata ya tinking? I don't want dat.
messages.sell_succeeds: Not bad I can use dis.

messages.buy_fails_object_does_not_exist: Go somewhere else will ya? We only got food and drink here.
messages.buy_fails_player_cannot_afford_object: I aint given dis stuff away, go beg'n somewhere else.
messages.buy_succeeds: Tanks I'm gona hit ya for %d we don't have a tab here.
messages.sell_fails_object_does_not_exist: I'm only buying thinks you got, not stuff you aint.
messages.sell_fails_shop_cannot_afford_object: Shoot wish I had that kind of doe.
messages.sell_fails_shop_does_not_buy_object: Wada ya tink I am, a general store? I don't want tat.
messages.sell_succeeds: I'll give ya %d for it, take it or leave it.

messages.buy_fails_object_does_not_exist: You see that here? Go somewhere else.
messages.buy_fails_player_cannot_afford_object: Sure how bout I give you  the shop too. Go get a job.
messages.buy_succeeds: Thanks. Anything else I can get ya?
messages.sell_fails_object_does_not_exist: You blind? I don't by things in your imagination.
messages.sell_fails_shop_does_not_buy_object: Armor, dats it. Anything else you go out the door.
messages.sell_succeeds: d up front. Take it or leave it.

messages.buy_fails_object_does_not_exist: If you run across one let me no, but I don't have it right now.
messages.sell_fails_shop_cannot_afford_object: Kind of strapped right now, try later.
messages.sell_fails_shop_does_not_buy_object: Maybe in the future, but not into that right now.

messages.buy_fails_object_does_not_exist: I Do not have that My Child. Pray and It will come.
messages.buy_fails_player_cannot_afford_object: You must donate more than that to gain such a blessing.
messages.buy_succeeds: Take this and live a blessed life my child.
messages.sell_fails_object_does_not_exist: I fear you do not carry such an item with you..you must have more faith...then will the gods reward you.
messages.sell_fails_shop_cannot_afford_object: My vows do not permit me to carry such wealth...wealth is for the sinfull.
messages.sell_fails_shop_does_not_buy_object: I do not trade in mortal goods...I am sorry my child.
messages.sell_succeeds: For such an object I can give you %d.

messages.buy_fails_object_does_not_exist: Don't have that in my spell book..yet.
messages.sell_fails_object_does_not_exist: Got to see it before I'll buy it.
messages.sell_fails_shop_cannot_afford_object: Can't aford that, us wizards aren't rich.
messages.sell_fails_shop_does_not_buy_object: Got to be magic or I don't buy.

messages.buy_fails_object_does_not_exist: Sorry, I sell water, only water.
messages.buy_fails_player_cannot_afford_object: Sorry, I need gold not dreams, and you only have dreams.
messages.buy_succeeds: Enjoy. Did you know water is one of the 4 elements?
messages.sell_fails_object_does_not_exist: You may think you have that, but you don't.
messages.sell_fails_shop_cannot_afford_object: Water's down lately, can't buy that much..sorry.
messages.sell_fails_shop_does_not_buy_object: I only buy liquid, that's it.
messages.sell_succeeds: Here's %d. Nice doing business with you.
